title: RHO Summary
description: Per-run viability certificate summary. Produced at run end. Linter verifies this is consistent with rho_trace.ndjson and rho_manifest.json.

run_id.description: Must match the run_id in the corresponding rho_manifest.json.

inf_rho.description: inf_{t <= N} rho(t) = min over the entire trace. Positive = DELIVER, non-positive = ABORT.

t_star.description: Witness time: argmin_t rho(t). The step where the viability was tightest.

active_constraint.description: The margin that achieved the minimum at t_star. This is the named emergent for HELEN.

margins_at_t_star.description: All margin values at the witness time t_star, plus the computed rho.

rho.description: Computed rho = min(mu_Delta, mu_Pi, mu_CFL, mu_Lyap, mu_Z) at t_star. Must match inf_rho within delta_audit.

helen_termination.description: Optional HELEN termination block, populated when this summary is used as a Foundry run receipt.

reason_codes.description: Machine-readable reason codes. On ABORT must include ACTIVE_CONSTRAINT=<active_constraint>.

emergent_name.description: HELEN-assigned emergent name derived from active_constraint and run context. E.g. active_constraint__mu_Pi.

falsifier.description: Operational falsifier for the emergent claim. Must be a concrete, runnable test description.
